svg.title: Pixel Eruv — Overall System Architecture (High-Level Overview)
svg.desc: All components across the public internet, Traefik edge, and the internal Docker Compose network: client (Phaser + LiveKit JS), simulation plane (Pusher + World Simulator), extensions, NATS bus, media plane (LiveKit SFU + Bridge + coturn), persistence (PocketBase + SeaweedFS + Redis), and identity (Dex).
svg.text: All planes: client · edge · simulation · extensions · bus · media · persistence · identity
register · spawn · update · triggers · zones · input · KV

g.text: TLS termination · sticky WebSocket sessions · routing
NPCs · triggers · zones · LLM agents · interactive objects
All gameplay behavior — the kernel only moves player avatars — via NATS only
Core pub/sub (ephemeral, at-most-once) + JetStream KV (semi-persistent, kv.Watch)
Every backend service communicates through NATS — no direct service-to-service RPC
NATS is the only bus · Redis is LiveKit-only · Extensions own gameplay · Kernel = spatial authority + replication only
